name: Confluence Get Page by Title
description: Find a page by title (+ optional space) via GET /rest/api/content.
script:
import requests
try:
    import urllib3
    urllib3.disable_warnings()
except Exception:
    pass

TIMEOUT = 30

class NodeError(Exception):
    pass

def _client():
    base = str(base_url or "").strip().rstrip("/")
    em = str(email or "").strip()
    token = str(api_token or "").strip()
    if not base:
        raise NodeError("base_url is required (e.g. https://your-org.atlassian.net/wiki)")
    if not em or not token:
        raise NodeError("email and api_token are required")
    sess = requests.Session()
    sess.verify = False
    sess.headers.update({
        "Authorization": "Bearer " + token,
        "Accept": "application/json",
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
    })
    return sess, base

def _check(resp):
    if not resp.ok:
        detail = ""
        try:
            j = resp.json()
            detail = j.get("message") or str(j)
        except Exception:
            detail = (resp.text or "")[:300]
        raise NodeError("Confluence API %s: %s" % (resp.status_code, detail))
    return resp

def _page_out(base, page):
    links = page.get("_links", {}) or {}
    webui = links.get("webui", "")
    site = links.get("base") or base.split("/wiki")[0]
    body_v = (((page.get("body") or {}).get("storage") or {}).get("value"))
    return {
        "id": page.get("id"),
        "title": page.get("title"),
        "body": body_v,
        "version": ((page.get("version") or {}).get("number")),
        "status": page.get("status"),
        "url": (site + webui) if webui else "",
    }

s, base = _client()
exp = str(expand or "").strip() or "body.storage,version"
params = {"title": str(title).strip(), "expand": exp}
if str(space_key).strip():
    params["spaceKey"] = str(space_key).strip()
r = _check(s.get(base + "/rest/api/content", params=params, timeout=TIMEOUT))
results = r.json().get("results") or []
if not results:
    id = None
    title = None
    body = None
    version = None
    status = None
    url = ""
    found = False
else:
    out = _page_out(base, results[0])
    id = out["id"]
    title = out["title"]
    body = out["body"]
    version = out["version"]
    status = out["status"]
    url = out["url"]
    found = True
